archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - adapted for B2B SaaS
emotion_and_vibe: Authoritative, fast, reliable, and crisp. The UI must feel like a precision tool, not a playful toy.

rules: Never use Inter, Roboto, or standard generic sans-serifs for headings.
Labels must be uppercase, tiny, and wide tracked.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, optical alignment, and stark contrasts.

marketing_page.bento_features: Use overlapping bento boxes with high contrast.

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 fixed inset-y-0 left-0 bg-[#0B132B] text-white flex flex-col border-r border-[#1E293B]
dashboard.header: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-40 px-8 flex items-center justify-between
dashboard.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (The 'Control Room' mode)

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3A8A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3A8A]/90 transition-all rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm data-testid='btn-primary'
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1E3A8A] border border-slate-200 hover:border-[#1E3A8A] transition-all rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium data-testid='btn-secondary'
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium data-testid='btn-danger'

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.bento_item: bg-[#F8FAFC] border border-slate-200 p-8 rounded-xl relative overflow-hidden

inputs.chat_input: w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-full px-6 py-4 pr-16 shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3B82F6] focus:border-transparent transition-all text-slate-900

chat_bubbles.user: bg-[#EFF6FF] text-[#0F172A] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-5 max-w-[80%] self-end
chat_bubbles.ai: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-[#0F172A] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-5 max-w-[80%] self-start shadow-sm

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must explicitly change state (e.g. hover:border-[#1E3A8A] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200).
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings required (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3B82F6]).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for lists and grid items.

images.description: Professional team collaborating, use in marketing page hero section with a gradient overlay.
Abstract/clean minimalist logo for trusted by sections on the marketing page.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Apply data-testid to EVERY interactive and key informational element (buttons, links, inputs, cards). e.g., data-testid='upload-doc-button'.
Use plain .js and .jsx files. Do not use TypeScript.
Implement the dashboard using the dark sidebar (#0B132B) and white main area.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts in marketing pages, avoiding rigid Shadcn containers.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dialogs, Selects, Dropdowns, Tables) but customize them heavily to match the stark, border-driven 'Swiss & High-Contrast' aesthetic.
The chat interface should feel airy, with generous padding (p-5 for bubbles) and clear differentiation between user and AI.
Add 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to the application via Google Fonts in index.css.
Ensure the hero image uses an appropriate overlay (bg-white/20 to bg-white/40) if placing text over it, or place the image alongside the text in a grid.
Follow the mobile-first approach, ensuring the sidebar collapses into a hamburger menu on small screens.
